---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: KaiUR
---

## Summary
A clear one-line description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
